_comment: Template for third-party API keys used by optional tools. Copy this file to api_keys.json (gitignored) and fill in the keys you want to enable. Tools degrade gracefully when a key is missing — they either fall back to a no-key alternative or disable themselves.
_how_to_use: All keys are optional. Leave any slot as an empty string to disable that tool. The code reads this file via bridge/api_keys.py; add new slot names there when adding new tools.

brave_search._description: Brave Search API — web search with better quality than DuckDuckGo scraping. Free tier: 2,000 queries/month. Used as fallback or primary for web_search.

spoonacular._description: Spoonacular — recipe lookup + ingredient parsing. Free tier: 150 requests/day. Enables the recipe tool/widget (currently not shipped; needs a key to land).

openweathermap._description: OpenWeatherMap — alternative weather source with hourly forecast + air quality. Free tier: 1,000 calls/day. Current weather goes through Open-Meteo (no key); this is for richer data.

newsapi._description: NewsAPI.org — aggregated news from 80k+ sources. Free tier: 100 requests/day, non-commercial. Supplements our RSS-only feeds with more breadth.

tavily._description: Tavily Search — search API tuned for LLM retrieval (returns summaries, not just links). Free tier: 1,000 credits/month. Drop-in replacement for web_search with better result quality.

alpha_vantage._description: Alpha Vantage — stocks, ETFs, crypto, forex. Free tier: 25 requests/day. Extends the tracker subsystem with live equities.

bls._description: Bureau of Labor Statistics — CPI, unemployment, etc. Works without a key at 25 req/day; with a free key you get 500 req/day. Used by the tracker subsystem.

huggingface._description: Hugging Face Hub token — used for rate-limited model/snapshot downloads (GPT-SoVITS pretrained models, faster-whisper weights). Works without token but much slower/throttled.

anthropic._description: Anthropic API — optional remote Claude LLM. Useful for comparing quality vs local Qwen during dev. Not required for the normal voice loop.

openai._description: OpenAI API — optional remote GPT LLM. Same role as anthropic above; dev-only, not in the voice loop.
